description_long: This is a simple, sturdy wooden stool with a round, flat seat and three straight legs. The seat is thick and smoothly finished, showcasing the natural wood grain with a warm, medium-brown tone. The legs are slightly splayed for stability and are connected by two horizontal support bars, one lower and one higher, which also serve as a footrest. The construction is robust, with visible joinery that emphasizes functionality over ornamentation. There are no decorative elements or backrest, giving the stool a clean, minimalist appearance. The overall design is practical and well-suited for urban environments such as cafes, public spaces, or waiting areas.
description: A minimalist wooden stool with a round seat, three straight legs, and two horizontal support bars. The natural wood grain and simple construction give it a functional, modern look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round seat, three legs, and both horizontal support bars clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the thickness of the seat and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear angled view with a clear view of the leg joinery and the support bars.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the splay of the legs and the smooth, flat seat surface.
